title: The lamp on my desk
summary: Describe the lamp on your desk — what it looks like and when you use it.
prompt: Write 6–8 short sentences about a lamp on your desk. Describe what it looks like, when you turn it on, and why you like it. Use present simple.
hintStarters: I have a lamp on my desk. It is…
I turn on the lamp when…
I like this lamp because the light is…
sampleText: I have a desk lamp in my study in Helsinki. The lamp is silver with a round white shade. It has a long adjustable arm, so I can point the light where I need it. The switch is on the base of the lamp. I turn on the lamp every evening when I sit at my desk to study or work. The light is bright and white, which helps me see clearly without eye strain. During the day, I do not use the lamp because there is enough natural light from the window. In winter, it gets dark early in Finland, so I turn the lamp on before five o'clock. I clean the shade once a week because dust collects on it quickly. The lamp was a gift from my sister when I moved to my flat. It is not expensive but it does its job very well. I think a good lamp is one of the most useful things on a desk.

sampleAnnotations.phrase: silver with a round white shade
sampleAnnotations.meaningVi: màu bạc với chụp đèn trắng tròn
cần đèn dài có thể điều chỉnh

sampleAnnotations.phrase: point the light where I need it
sampleAnnotations.meaningVi: hướng ánh đèn về nơi tôi cần
ngồi tại bàn học của tôi
làm tốt nhiệm vụ của nó

sampleGrammarNotes.title: Present simple with 'when'
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyVi: Dùng 'when' với thì hiện tại đơn để nói về điều gì thường xảy ra trong một tình huống cụ thể: 'I turn on the lamp when I sit at my desk', 'When it gets dark, I turn the lamp on before five'.
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyEn: Use 'when' with the present simple to talk about what usually happens in a specific situation: 'I turn on the lamp when I sit at my desk', 'When it gets dark early, I turn the lamp on'.

sampleGrammarNotes.title: Negative present simple
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyVi: Dùng 'do not / does not' để nói về điều bạn không làm: 'I do not use the lamp during the day', 'It is not expensive'.
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyEn: Use 'do not / does not' for things you do not do: 'I do not use the lamp during the day', 'It is not expensive'.

sampleTranslationVi: Tôi có một chiếc đèn bàn trong phòng học ở Helsinki. Đèn màu bạc với chụp đèn trắng tròn. Nó có cần đèn dài có thể điều chỉnh được, nên tôi có thể hướng ánh đèn về nơi cần. Công tắc ở đế đèn. Tôi bật đèn mỗi tối khi ngồi tại bàn để học hoặc làm việc. Ánh đèn sáng và trắng, giúp tôi thấy rõ mà không bị mỏi mắt. Ban ngày tôi không dùng đèn vì có đủ ánh sáng tự nhiên từ cửa sổ. Vào mùa đông, trời tối sớm ở Phần Lan nên tôi bật đèn trước năm giờ. Tôi lau chụp đèn mỗi tuần một lần vì bụi bám vào nó rất nhanh. Đèn là quà của em gái tôi khi tôi dọn vào căn hộ. Nó không đắt nhưng làm tốt nhiệm vụ của nó. Tôi nghĩ một chiếc đèn tốt là một trong những thứ hữu ích nhất trên bàn học.

mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'The lamp is silver with a round white shade'.
mcQuestions.hint: Look for the colour of the lamp body, not the shade.

mcQuestions.prompt: What shape is the lamp shade?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'a round white shade'.
mcQuestions.hint: Find the adjective that describes the shade's shape.

mcQuestions.prompt: Why is the adjustable arm useful?
options: The writer can point the light where needed
It makes the lamp look attractive
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'I can point the light where I need it'.
mcQuestions.hint: Look for the benefit of having an adjustable arm.

mcQuestions.prompt: Where is the switch on the lamp?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'The switch is on the base of the lamp'.
mcQuestions.hint: Find the part of the lamp where the switch is located.

mcQuestions.prompt: When does the writer turn on the lamp?
options: Every evening when studying or working
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'I turn on the lamp every evening when I sit at my desk to study or work'.
mcQuestions.hint: Look for the time and situation when the lamp is switched on.

mcQuestions.prompt: Why does the writer not use the lamp during the day?
options: Because there is enough natural light
Because the desk is near the door
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'I do not use the lamp because there is enough natural light from the window'.
mcQuestions.hint: Find the reason for not using the lamp in the daytime.

mcQuestions.prompt: When does the writer turn the lamp on before five o'clock?
options: In winter, when it gets dark early
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'In winter, it gets dark early in Finland, so I turn the lamp on before five o'clock'.
mcQuestions.hint: Look for the season and reason mentioned.

mcQuestions.prompt: Who gave the writer the lamp?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'The lamp was a gift from my sister when I moved to my flat'.
mcQuestions.hint: Find the family member who gave the gift.

options: I not use the lamp during the day.
I do not use the lamp during the day.
I does not use the lamp during the day.
I am not use the lamp during the day.
mcQuestions.explanation: Negative present simple with 'I' uses 'do not': 'I do not use the lamp'.
mcQuestions.hint: Check which form of 'do not' is correct with the subject 'I'.

mcQuestions.prompt: Why does the writer clean the shade once a week?
options: Because it gets wet from condensation
Because dust collects on it quickly
Because the light is too bright otherwise
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'I clean the shade once a week because dust collects on it quickly'.
mcQuestions.hint: Find the reason linked to the shade getting dirty.

criticalThinkingQuestion: How does good lighting at a desk affect the way you work or study? Why is the quality of light in a workspace important?
